name: Marie's Baked Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Cooked dry butter beans (1 can)
16 ounces Dark red kidney beans, drained (1 can)
1 pound Bacon, cooked and chopped (ham may be substituted), with drippings
1 1/2 tablespoons Red wine vinegar or Apple cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow cooker pot, combine the butter beans, baked beans, kidney beans, bacon with drippings, onion, brown sugar, salt, seasoning, vinegar, and pineapple.
2. Add liquid smoke if desired.
3. Blend thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Cover and cook on the low setting of the slow cooker pot for 6 hours.
5. Serve with sourdough bread.
Note: If a thicker soup is preferred, drain all beans and vegetables before serving.
Preparation time: 15 minutes Cooking time: 6 hours
